summary: Phase 13 Real AWS Integration testing complete. All 9 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified via Playwright. CloudWatch monitoring, GuardDuty, and Macie all showing REAL data from AWS account 314108682794.
critical_code_review_comments: CloudWatch service correctly initializes boto3 clients with AWS credentials from env
Real AWS data flowing: 3 CloudWatch alarms, 4 SNS topics, 5 EventBridge rules, 14 S3 buckets, 1 GuardDuty finding
SNS publish API successfully sends real messages to AWS SNS topics
LIVE indicator correctly shows aws_connected status in frontend
All CloudWatch tabs (Overview, Alarms, SNS, EventBridge) properly render real data
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_phase13_real_aws.py - Created 9 tests for Phase 13 real AWS integration
seed_data_creation: Used existing AWS resources - no test data created
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 13 uses REAL AWS data. CloudWatch dashboard at /cloudwatch shows live AWS monitoring with LIVE indicator. All counts verified: 3 alarms (all OK), 4 SNS topics, 5 EventBridge rules (all ENABLED), 14 S3 buckets, 1 GuardDuty detector with 1 finding.

mocked_apis_list: Macie PII scanning is simulated (Macie not enabled on AWS account) but S3 bucket list is REAL
mocked_apis.note: All CloudWatch, GuardDuty, and Macie S3 bucket data is fetched from real AWS account 314108682794

cloudwatch_backend.GET /api/cloudwatch/health: PASS - aws_connected: true, alarms_count: 3, sns_topics_count: 4, eventbridge_rules_count: 5
cloudwatch_backend.GET /api/cloudwatch/dashboard: PASS - Returns real dashboard with 3 alarms, 4 SNS, 5 EventBridge rules
cloudwatch_backend.GET /api/cloudwatch/alarms: PASS - Returns 3 real alarms (bigmann-development-cloudfront-errors, high-error-rate, high-response-time)
cloudwatch_backend.GET /api/cloudwatch/sns-topics: PASS - Returns 4 real SNS topics including Big Mann Entertainment development Alerts
cloudwatch_backend.GET /api/cloudwatch/eventbridge-rules: PASS - Returns 5 real EventBridge rules (all ENABLED)
cloudwatch_backend.POST /api/cloudwatch/sns/publish: PASS - Successfully publishes real message to AWS SNS

guardduty_backend.GET /api/guardduty/dashboard: PASS - Returns real data: 1 detector, 1 finding (Policy:IAMUser/RootCredentialUsage)

macie_backend.GET /api/macie/buckets: PASS - Returns 14 real S3 buckets from AWS

cloudwatch_frontend.live_indicator: PASS - LIVE indicator shows with aws_connected: true
cloudwatch_frontend.overview_tab: PASS - Shows 4 stat cards with real counts
cloudwatch_frontend.alarms_tab: PASS - Shows 3 real alarm cards with OK status
cloudwatch_frontend.sns_tab: PASS - Shows 4 real SNS topic cards with Publish Message button
cloudwatch_frontend.eventbridge_tab: PASS - Shows 5 real EventBridge rule cards (all ENABLED)
cloudwatch_frontend.sns_publish_modal: PASS - Modal opens correctly with topic ARN
cloudwatch_frontend.nav_link: PASS - CloudWatch nav link present with data-testid='nav-cloudwatch-link'

guardduty_frontend.page_loads: PASS - /guardduty loads with Overview and Findings tabs
guardduty_frontend.stat_cards: PASS - Shows Total Detectors: 1, Active: 1, Total Findings: 1, New: 1

macie_frontend.s3_buckets_tab: PASS - Shows 14 real S3 buckets including bigmann-entertainment-media
